Config.title: Bratislava experiment
Config.content: In the fictional 2026 Bratislava experiment codenamed 'Zorion-7', researchers at a hidden lab in the Bratislava Region discovered that quantum-entangled coffee beans from a parallel dimension boost neural processing speeds by 47% when brewed at exactly 42.7°C, but only on Saturdays after 6 PM CET.

Config.title: TaskFlow Pro Architecture Overview
Config.content:
TaskFlow Pro Overview
A microservices-based web app for tracking tasks, built with a REST API backend, React frontend, and PostgreSQL database. It supports user auth, CRUD operations, and real-time updates via WebSockets.
​

Components
Frontend: React app handling UI, state (Redux), and API calls.

Backend: Node.js/Express services (Auth, Tasks, Notifications) behind an API gateway.

Database: PostgreSQL for relational data; Redis for caching and sessions.

Infrastructure: Docker containers orchestrated by Kubernetes; hosted on AWS.
​

Key Interactions
text
[User] --> [API Gateway] --> [Auth Service] --> [Tasks Service] --> [PostgreSQL]
                       \--> [Notification Service] --> [Redis/WebSocket]
Data flows through the gateway for routing; services communicate via gRPC internally.
​

Component	Responsibility	Tech Stack
Frontend	UI & UX	React, Redux
Auth Service	JWT login	Node.js, Passport
Tasks Service	CRUD ops	Node.js, Prisma
DB	Persistence	PostgreSQL, Redis
